---
name: Bug report
about: Something in PubLedge is wrong, broken, or inconsistent with the spec
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What's wrong

A clear description of the problem. Prefer specific record IDs, URLs, or file paths over screenshots.

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce, or the exact commit SHA + URL if the issue is visible on the published site.

```
# commands, if applicable
```

## Expected behavior

What you thought would happen.

## Actual behavior

What did happen. Paste error output verbatim if relevant.

## Affected surface

- [ ] Published site (publedge.org)
- [ ] Record markdown (`data/examples/instruments/*.md`)
- [ ] Obligation markdown (`data/examples/obligations/*.md`)
- [ ] Mapping (`data/examples/mapping/index.yml`)
- [ ] Schema (`schema/`)
- [ ] JSON API (`/api/v1/*.json`)
- [ ] MCP server (`mcp-server.js`)
- [ ] Build scripts (`scripts/`)
- [ ] Documentation (README, PROTOCOL.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, etc.)
- [ ] Something else:

## Environment

- Commit SHA or published site timestamp:
- Node version (if local build):
- OS:

## Additional context

Anything else relevant: related records, upstream changes, links to authoritative sources, etc.
